title: (progetto multiverso) ultra mod
description: This mod adds many new RPG features to the game
body:
There are many new features in this mod including weapons, biomes, mobs and more. Below are further details

with version 1.2.0 the ons have been improved with a series of missions dedicated to them and other mutant entities have been added, the partygoers with some specific missions

  
**Oni:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

the oni is a demon of medium power. has a 5 block terror radius where if the player enters it they will be given slowness, weakness and hallucination effects,

If you are attacked, your slowness and weakness will increase, a blindness effect will be added and hallucinations will be more frequent,  
If you stay in the oni area too long or get hit too many times you will receive a jumpscare and take 4 damage (death from cardiac arrest)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/934160/description_57df7530-fc9f-4189-9090-ba178ef0caa6.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/934160/description_7505052c-7781-4be0-9f1b-2d36c48fc422.png)

there is another variant of each alpha call, these have a greater terror radius and give stronger effects

 

</details>






**The partygoer:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
The partygoer is a medium-powered chimera. It is hostile towards the player and if attacked it will be hit by a poison that transforms the player into a partygoer after 10 minutes, it is possible to create a vaccine against the pathogen

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/975558/description_bb851161-a5da-409b-b22a-e5dfb789504a.png)

There is another variant of partygoer called host, these have stronger poison and more damage

It is possible to take poison from a partygoer to create a more powerful toxin.

</details>



 

**demon:** the demon is one of the classes that can be used by the player, it is very strong but has less energy, demons can use the blood manipulation technique and are also the only ones who can eat human flesh to regenerate


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

abilità:

Bloody Arrow: Creates a very fast bloody arrow that pierces opponents and poisons them

Self-destruction: (! WARNING! ⚠️ use this technique only in extreme cases, because it kills the player) heats your blood to explode and take away as many enemies as possible

Kagune: Tentacles grow from the user's back, piercing all nearby enemies

**secret ability:**  
If the demon drinks from a shower after another player has cleaned the cesium dust, it will receive a fury effect for 60 seconds in which the blood sword will be created 

blood sword: can be obtained from a demon that eats human flesh (with a 0.5% chance) or drinks water contaminated with cesium, the weapon can perform a dash that will increase the demon's speed

</details>



 

  
**Curses**:Curses are very powerful creatures that have a high amount of usable energy but have low health, they are the only ones that can increase their energy with experience

abilità:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Incomplete Domain Expansion: Plunges a portion of the world into a fog that damages and kills enemies

lapse blue: a sphere of blue energy that attracts all mobs to the player, attracted mobs take kinetic damage

Jade Dogs: Creates 2 dogs that help players kill enemies

</details>



 

**Saiyan**:Saiyans are very strong but have low speed and are the only ones who can increase their strength during a fight

abilità:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

passive ability: taking or doing damage increases the charge of "brutal strength" at 1st level and basic at 2nd it grants more energy and at 3rd it gives more strength but reduces speed

kii blast: launches a small sphere of energy that explodes and shocks the enemy hit for 2 seconds

solar cannon: produces a strong light that briefly blinds enemies and deals 3 damage

Energy Shield: Protects the player from all damage for 5 seconds


</details>


 

custom weapon:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**oni dagger**: it is a weapon created from the horns of the oni, it allows you to drive those hit crazy.  
passive: attacking a mob causes it to lose health  
Right button: Create a small terror ray   
Right key + shift: throw an oni eye

 

**the party sword**: allows you to transform all creatures hit into peaceful partygoers who help the player  
Right button: Releases a cloud of poison   
tadto Dx + shift: bomb everything around the player

</details>
